Dear Sir/Madam, 
Sub: Transcript of the Earnings Conference Call held on July 22, 2022 
In continuation to our letter dated July 22, 2022 regarding the Intimation of conference call with 
Analysts and Institutional Investors pursuant to Regulation 30 of the of SEBI (Listing Obligations 
and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, we wish to inform that the virtual Earnings Call 
with Analysts/Investors on the financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2022 that was held on 
July 22, 2022 after the Board meeting of the Company, the transcript of 
which 
is 
available 
on 
the 
website 
of 
the 
Company 
at https://www.coforge.com/investors/transcripts 
You are requested to take note of the same. 
Thanking you, 
For Coforge Limited 
(Erstwhile NIIT Technologies Limited)
